areas.name: Levin – Purple Zone
areas.notes: Have your kiwibin kerbside by 7am. Purple-zone Levin streets – check your bin lid colour or contact us if unsure which zone you're in.

areas.name: Levin – Orange Zone
areas.notes: Have your kiwibin kerbside by 7am. Orange-zone Levin streets.

areas.name: Levin – Green Zone
areas.notes: Have your kiwibin kerbside by 7am. Green-zone Levin streets.

areas.name: Manakau
areas.notes: Fortnightly collection on alternate Wednesdays. Two kiwibins provided. As the area grows we'll move to weekly service – contact us for your next collection date.

areas.name: Koputaroa
areas.notes: Fortnightly collection on alternate Wednesdays. Two kiwibins provided. Contact us for your next collection date.

globalNote: Get your kiwibin kerbside by 7am on collection day. Public holidays may affect your collection – check our Facebook page @kiwibins for updates.
